description: Add Step 4.5 to templates/epilogue.md — conditional CHANGELOG update between Step 4 and Step 5
acceptance_criteria: Step 4.5 section exists between Step 4 and Step 5
Step 4.5 is conditional — skip with documented reason if nothing notable
Step 4.5 specifies Added/Changed/Fixed format matching existing CHANGELOG.md
Step 4.5 entry is 3–8 bullets drawn from session context
Step numbering for Steps 5–8 updated to 6–9 accordingly
steps: Read templates/epilogue.md in full
Identify insertion point between Step 4 and Step 5
Draft Step 4.5 content: conditional intro, format spec, example entry
Renumber Steps 5–8 to Steps 6–9 throughout the file
Update Table of Contents if present
Commit: docs(epilogue): add conditional CHANGELOG update step

description: Reword epilogue Step 1 to mark session summaries as local-only with *-session.md naming convention
acceptance_criteria: Step 1 instructs agent to write locally, do not stage
Filename format updated to yyyy-mm-dd-<descriptor>-session.md
Step 1 explicitly states file is covered by .gitignore
No instruction to commit the summary file remains in Step 1
steps: Read templates/epilogue.md Step 1 section
Reword filename format to yyyy-mm-dd-<descriptor>-session.md
Add explicit note: 'Do not stage this file — it is covered by .gitignore'
Remove any commit instruction from Step 1
Commit: docs(epilogue): mark session summary as local-only with *-session.md naming

description: Audit and update epilogue Step 7 closure checklist: drop 2 stale items, add 2 new items, reword 1
acceptance_criteria: Checklist no longer contains 'Git repository exists locally' item
Checklist no longer contains 'origin remote exists and is reachable' item
Checklist contains 'CHANGELOG.md updated with session entry, or skipped — nothing notable'
Checklist contains '.gitignore includes *-session.md pattern'
Commit-message item references Conventional Commits per RULES.md §6
Commit-message item does not use the phrase 'dated message'
Summary item reworded to 'written locally (not staged — gitignored)'
steps: Read templates/epilogue.md Step 7 in full
Remove git-init check item
Remove origin-setup check item
Add CHANGELOG item after skills item
Add .gitignore item after CHANGELOG item
Reword commit-message item to reference Conventional Commits
Reword summary item to local-only language
Commit: docs(epilogue): audit closure checklist — drop stale items, add changelog and gitignore checks

description: Update epilogue Step 8 Final Report template: add CHANGELOG field, remove Summary path field
acceptance_criteria: Final Report template contains 'CHANGELOG: <updated | skipped — reason>' field
Final Report template does not contain 'Summary: <path-to-summary>' field
All other existing fields (Branch, Commit, Remote, Skills, Context files, Status, Next steps) are preserved
Field order is logical: Session closed → Branch → Commit → Remote → CHANGELOG → Skills → Context files → Status → Next steps
steps: Read templates/epilogue.md Step 8 in full
Replace Summary field with CHANGELOG field
Verify all other fields present and correctly ordered
Commit: docs(epilogue): update final report template with changelog field

description: Add *-session.md to .gitignore so session summary files are never staged
acceptance_criteria: .gitignore contains '*-session.md' on its own line
Entry is placed in a logical section (local/temp files or similar)
Existing .gitignore entries are undisturbed
steps: Read .gitignore in full
Identify appropriate section for local/temp file patterns
Add '*-session.md' entry
Commit: chore: ignore *-session.md session summary files

description: Remove 6 tracked dated analysis files from repo root via git rm
acceptance_criteria: git ls-files | grep '^2026-05.*\.md' returns empty at repo root
All 6 files are deleted from disk
No other files are accidentally removed
Removal committed with a clear message
steps: Run git ls-files to confirm all 6 files are tracked
Run git rm on each of the 6 files
Verify git status shows only the 6 deletions staged
Commit: chore: remove tracked dated analysis files from repo root
